name: HRQ_SUBSCRIBERS_VL
query: SELECT B.SUBSCRIBER_ID, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.SUBSCRIBER_CODE, L.NAME, B.INCLUDE_NA_OPT, L.INCLUDE_NA_TEXT, B.INTERFACE_CLASS, B.DEFAULT_QUESTIONNAIRE_ID, B.DEFAULT_RATING_MODEL_ID, B.MODULE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRQ_SUBSCRIBERS_B B, HRQ_SUBSCRIBERS_TL L WHERE B.SUBSCRIBER_ID = L.SUBSCRIBER_ID AND B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = L.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND L.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
